error_signature: webhook url environment option not set
title: Webhook URL not configured in environment variables
symptom: The user is unable to receive incoming webhooks, and the domain is set to localhost. Basic authentication is also not functioning as expected.
root_cause: The webhook URL environment variable is not set correctly, which prevents n8n from receiving incoming webhooks. This is crucial for n8n to know where to listen for webhook requests.
fix_steps: Set the `WEBHOOK_URL` environment variable to the correct URL (e.g., https://n8n.example.com/)
Restart the n8n container using `docker-compose up -d`
agent_instruction: Set the `WEBHOOK_URL` environment variable to your n8n instance URL and restart the container.
